title: Monitor (carrier)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Monitor''''' was a training [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]].

==History==
The initial trials of the experimental [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wing bombers]] were conducted on the ''Monitor''.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Monitor]]'' was originally mentioned in the online authorial FAQ of [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]], author of the [[The Black Fleet Crisis|''Black Fleet Crisis'' trilogy]], rather than in the novels of that series, but this information was retrospectively added to the published [[canon]] in sources such as ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
